title: P27B record P27 result
objective:
Run script:
"""
queue_path = Path('governance/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
queue = json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
for task in queue.get('tasks', []):
    if task.get('id') == 'P26B':
        task['status'] = 'DONE'
        task['sha'] = 'dd0850cce54105d2a7e301c2135c5bb247d1c00d'
        task['completed_at'] = '2026-06-04T11:14:57Z'
    if task.get('id') == 'P27':
        task['status'] = 'DONE'
        task['sha'] = '94b73379c3160c01d636f087388f895d5141238b'
        task['completed_at'] = '2026-06-04T11:15:39Z'
    if task.get('id') == 'P27B':
        task['status'] = 'IN_PROGRESS'
queue['updated_at'] = '2026-06-04T11:17:00Z'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
log_path = Path('governance/logs/execution_log.jsonl')
existing = log_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if log_path.exists() else ''
lines = [json.dumps({'date':'2026-06-04T11:14:57Z','id':'P26B','trace_id':'p26b_record_p26_result_queue_log','sha':'dd0850cce54105d2a7e301c2135c5bb247d1c00d','status':'done','workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False), json.dumps({'date':'2026-06-04T11:15:39Z','id':'P27','trace_id':'p27_real_roadmap_execution_audit','sha':'94b73379c3160c01d636f087388f895d5141238b','status':'done','workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False)]
for line in lines:
    if line not in existing:
        existing += line + '\n'
log_path.write_text(existing, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(log_path))
state = Path('governance/state/P27B_RECORD_P27_RESULT_QUEUE_LOG.json')
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'P27B','trace_id':'p27b_record_p27_result_queue_log','status':'completed','release_pass':False,'recorded_steps':['P26B','P27'],'workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'P28 consolidate current queue status report'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/P27B_RECORD_P27_RESULT_QUEUE_LOG.md')
report.write_text('# P27B | Record P27 result in queue and log\nStatus: completed\nDate: 2026-06-04\n\nRecorded P26B and P27 SHA evidence in ACTIVE_QUEUE.json and execution_log.jsonl. Workflow lock respected.\n\nNext: P28 consolidate current queue status report.\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
